title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Navistar

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Mahindra Navistar
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Navistar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Navistar:
Mahindra Navistar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Navistar!
